Udānaṭṭhakathā/Bodhivagga/Paṭhamabodhisu.text: Nirodhavirodhi ca uppādo, so uppādavirodhibhāvena vutto (Ka)

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Nandavagga/Nandasuttavaṇṇ.text: Pubbe ceva etarahi ca anāgatattā eva (Sī)

variants.reading: Pubbe ceva etarahi ca anāgatattā eva

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Meghiyavagga/Meghiyasutta.text: Mukhametaṁ pamukhametanti (Sī, Syā) Vi 3. 141 piṭṭhe passitabbaṁ.

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Soṇavagga/Appāyukasuttava.text: Virūpopi putto surūpo piyamanāpo (Sī), virūpopi samāno manāpo (Ka)

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Soṇavagga/Suppabuddhakuṭṭ.text: Aniccatāya passa taṁ viditvā (Syā), aniccatāyupagataṁ viditvā (Ma-Ṭṭha 4. 90 piṭṭhe.)
Sā eva tittiriyāti vedasākhā jātāti (Sī), so eva tittirasāṇiyeva osadhānīti (Syā)
Saha ṭhāti saha vāti vā (Sī), sahaṭhāyī sahavāsī (Syā)

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Soṇavagga/Uposathasuttava.text: piṭṭhipāsāṇaṭṭhānanti vā (Ka) Aṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 220 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Soṇavagga/Soṇasuttavaṇṇan.text: Puthujjanataṁ sandhāya evaṁ (Sī), puthujjanataṁ sandhāya eva (Syā)

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Jaccandhavagga/Āyusaṅkhār.text: So pana vuccati (Sī, Syā), so pana ruccati (Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 145; Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 283 piṭṭhesu pana passitabbaṁ.
Punambhavasaṅkhārajanakaṁ (Syā), punabbhavassa saṅkhāraṁ (Saṁ-Ṭṭha 3. 285; Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 147 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.)
Bandhitvā tena adhonābhipariyantaṁ bandhitvā ekenantena hi (Ka), bandhitvā ekenantena hi (Sī)

variants.reading: Bandhitvā tena adhonābhipariyantaṁ bandhitvā ekenantena hi

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Jaccandhavagga/Sattajaṭil.text: Bandhitvā tena adhonābhipariyantaṁ bandhitvā ekenantena hi (Ka), bandhitvā ekenantena hi (Sī)

variants.reading: Bandhitvā tena adhonābhipariyantaṁ bandhitvā ekenantena hi

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Cūḷavagga/Aparalakuṇḍakab.text: Setaparikkhāroti (Sī, Syā) Saṁ 3. 5 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Pāṭaligāmiyavagga/Tatiyan.text: Ayamettha adhippāyo. Niddhāraṇamukhena yuttivicāraṇāya vā (Sī, Syā)

Udānaṭṭhakathā/Pāṭaligāmiyavagga/Pāṭalig.text: Susīlo appicchako viya (Sī), dappito viya (Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 129 piṭṭhe)
Uppannaparissayā pālenti (Sī, Ka) Dī-Ṭṭha 2. 132 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
